backend: Engine used to run local models. Use llama.cpp with GGUF files; use mlx-lm with MLX folders.
big_gguf: Main model file, used for reasoning, coding, and heavier chats.
small_gguf: Light model file for quick requests. Leave it empty if you do not want a small LLM LLM.
big_mlx: Main MLX model folder. Select the folder, not a single file.
no_small: Start only the large LLM to use less memory.
model_big: API name for the large LLM. Claude Code and local apps use this name.
model_small: API name for the small LLM LLM. It distinguishes small LLM from large LLM.
ctx_big: Maximum conversation memory for the large LLM. With parallel slots, it is divided.
ctx_small: Maximum conversation memory for the small LLM LLM. Increase only if small LLM runs out of context.
kv_type: Internal model memory format. q8_0 uses less memory; f16 is more conservative but heavier.
ngl: How many model layers to place on the GPU. On Apple Silicon, 99 usually means all.
parallel: How many requests large LLM can handle at once. More than 1 increases parallelism but splits context.
parallel_small: How many requests the small LLM can handle at once.
batch: Tokens processed together during large LLM prefill. Higher can be faster, but uses more memory.
batch_small: Small batch. Empty uses the large LLM value; lower uses less memory.
ubatch: Big sub-batch during prefill. Lower it if memory spikes. It must stay below batch.
ubatch_small: Small sub-batch. Empty uses small LLM batch. It must stay below small LLM batch.
cache_reuse: Reuses already computed prompt parts. Change it only when measuring cache problems.
cache_reuse_small: Small cache reuse. Empty uses the large LLM value.
reasoning_budget: Maximum tokens the model may use for internal reasoning before answering.
presence_penalty: Reduces repetitions. Too high can make code worse.
pdf_mode: How to read PDFs: hybrid tries text and images; text uses text only; image uses images.
mmproj: Projector file for vision models. Empty tries autodetect; off disables vision.
embed_gguf: Model for semantic search. Do not put it in large LLM or small LLM: it belongs in the embedding slot.
model_embed: API name for the embedding model.
embed_batch: Tokens processed together by the embedding slot. It must cover the longest chunks.
embed_port: Local port for the embedding slot.
proxy_port: Local port for the Claude Code compatible proxy.
big_port: Local port for the large LLM server.
small_port: Local port for the small LLM LLM server.
llama_bin: Command or path for the llama-server binary.
mlx_bin: Command or path for the MLX server, for example mlx_lm.server.
extra_big_flags: Extra options passed to the large LLM server. Use only if you know what each flag does.
cc_auto_compact_window: When the chat reaches about this many tokens, Claude Code compacts older messages.
cc_max_output_tokens: Maximum number of tokens Claude Code can generate in one answer.
cc_tool_search: Loads tools only when needed. It can speed startup with many MCPs; applies from the next chat.
kb_dir: Global folder added to Claude Code. Empty means disabled.
studio_markdown: Shows answers with headings, lists, code, and tables. Off shows raw text.
studio_autostart: Starts large LLM, small LLM, and proxy automatically when Studio opens.
studio_lan_enabled: Exposes Studio on the local network the next time it opens. Use only on trusted networks.
